reason: Auto-generated excerpt (raw field was empty) glued a heading fragment directly to the affiliate disclosure line ('Quick Answer Affiliate disclosure: We earn a commission...'), reading as broken text. set_excerpt: A complete guide to choosing a bank account as a newcomer to Canada — eligibility, how accounts compare, and building credit from day one.
